caption:
Why are we copying 9 figure brands for creative strategy?

Watch the latest Foreplay Fireside with @binghott @CTtheDisrupter @shabbaraptor @foreplayzach and @jackdoesecom
Love this take on the ai content arms race from@binghott

If your ad doesn’t scream “THIS IS FOR YOU” in the first 1.5 seconds…

You’re not just losing clicks, you’re losing the sale. 💸

@binghott (aka the king of converting with “ugly” ads) puts it simply:

Most creatives flop because they’re focused on the brand, not the buyer. 😬

So if your scroll-stopper… doesn’t stop the scroll?

Fix these 👇

🔥 Make the creative about them, not you
🔥 Show something they actually care about
🔥 Speak to their problems like you read their mind

Because let’s be real…

Self-centered ads = self-sabotaged results. 😏

Share this to your team and remind them to make ads that actually do not feel like ads.

#adcreative #consumerbehavior #customerexperience #adcreatives #digitalmarketingtips

caption:
He spends millions a month on ads — and his advice is brutally simple 👀

I asked this guy how much he spends on Meta ads.
He said: “A few million a month.” 😳

Then he gave one of my favorite pieces of advice ever:

“Go make an ad.
Find organic content your audience loves — and make something that looks like it.”

Stop overthinking. Stop waiting for perfection.
Just make it. Do the reps. Build the muscle.

You might make something terrible — and that’s okay.
Because the only way to learn how to make great ads…
is to make more ads.

Would your ads get better if you just started creating today? 👇

Comment “SCALE” if you want to apply to work with me 1:1
and learn how to build ad systems that actually scale. 🚀
firstComment: Love this: millions on Meta ads, but key is mimicking organic + massive reps. Ads win acquisition; email wins the wallet. Helped a 7-figure e-comm brand: ad creatives + personalized win-backs → 5.4x ROAS overall. Comment 'SCALE' if you want the email playbook too!
